figures.caption: Table 1. Average and standard deviation of the scores collected in our user study.
Fig. 1. In the considered task users built a color-ordered brick tower with (b) or without robot help (a).

Fig. 2. Experimental setup: Users sat at a table and built a color-patterned tower from memory. Some bricks were placed far away, requiring users to stand and retrieve them one at a time. Depending on the modality, a mobile robot assisted by fetching bricks or providing color reminders and error feedback.
Fig. 4. Distribution of the task (top), emotional (center), and robot score (bottom) for the three modalities; dots and diamonds are individual samples and means.
Fig. 5. Scores scatter plots between modalities.
